title: schedonorus poiformis
intro: Schedonorus poiformis, also known as Poverty Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America that belongs to the Poaceae family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Schedonorus poiformis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
